case_title: MARK BLAIR OSUNA VS. WU WUE MING ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-26-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSUNA, MARK BLAIR AS TO DEFENDANT MING, WU WUE CHUN, JAMES CHIN YU LO TRUST KEVORKIAN, SEVAN RE/MAX-PRESTIGIOUS PROPERTIES DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-13-2023 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-11-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-20-2023
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-13-2023 CONTINUED TO FEB-14-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-14-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
